channel.title: The Quiet Storm
channel.description: Evidence-based anxiety guidance through somatic approaches, Vedantic philosophy, and modern neuroscience.

item.title: The Neurobiology of Safety Signals
item.description:
What do you do when your body is screaming danger and your mind can't find the threat?

item.description: Everything you've been told about calming down is probably making it worse. The distinction between top-down and bottom-up regulation is not merely academic — it determines which approaches will work ...

item.title: The Fawn Response and People-Pleasing as Survival

item.title: The Nervous System Doesn't Know the Threat Is Over
